tasks.title: Chat API types + client functions
Chat Zustand store
Markdown renderer + source components
tasks.description:
Build the markdown rendering and source reference display components.

## Prerequisites
Install in `packages/ui`: `pnpm add react-markdown remark-gfm rehype-highlight`
(Run from frontend/packages/ui directory)

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/chat/markdown-renderer.tsx`

'use client' component that renders markdown content.

```tsx
interface MarkdownRendererProps {
  content: string;
}
```

Use `react-markdown` with plugins:
- `remarkGfm` for tables, strikethrough, task lists
- `rehypeHighlight` for code syntax highlighting

Custom component overrides:
- `pre` + `code`: dark code blocks with `bg-[var(--surface)]` background, rounded corners, padding. Code font: monospace. Add a copy button (top right) that copies code to clipboard.
- `a`: open in new tab (`target='_blank' rel='noopener'`), accent color
- `table`: bordered with `border-[var(--border)]`, header row with surface background
- `p`, `li`, `h1-h6`: proper spacing with Tailwind
- `blockquote`: left border accent, italic, surface-hover background

All styling via Tailwind classes using CSS variables (--text, --surface, --border, --accent).

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/chat/source-panel.tsx`

Collapsible panel shown under assistant messages when sources exist.

```tsx
interface SourcePanelProps {
  sources: SourceItem[];  // from @gilbertus/api-client types
}
```

- Default: collapsed, shows toggle button: "{N} źródeł" with ChevronDown icon
- Expanded: grid of SourceCard components (2 columns on md+, 1 on mobile)
- Smooth expand/collapse animation (max-height transition or similar)

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/chat/source-card.tsx`

Single source reference card.

```tsx
interface SourceCardProps {
  source: SourceItem;
}
```

Display:
- Icon by source_type: Mail (email), Users (teams), MessageCircle (whatsapp), FileText (document), Mic (plaud), Calendar (calendar), Bot (chatgpt), FileText (pdf)
- Title (truncated, max 1 line)
- source_name (secondary text)
- created_at formatted as relative or date (e.g., '2026-03-29')
- Styling: surface background, border, rounded, hover effect
- Use Lucide icons from `lucide-react` (already a dependency)

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/chat/index.ts`
Re-export all chat components:
```typescript
export { MarkdownRenderer } from './markdown-renderer';
export { SourcePanel } from './source-panel';
export { SourceCard } from './source-card';
```

Also update `packages/ui/src/index.ts` to add:
```typescript
export * from './components/chat';
```

tasks.title: Message bubble + empty state + quick actions UI
Chat sidebar + header + input components
useChat hook — API orchestration
Message list + scroll container
tasks.description:
Build the message list component that handles scrolling, auto-scroll, and renders messages.

## File: `packages/ui/src/components/chat/message-list.tsx`

'use client' component — scrollable container for messages.

```tsx
interface MessageListProps {
  messages: ChatMessage[];
  onRetry: (messageId: string) => void;
}
```

Implementation:
- Scrollable container: `flex-1 overflow-y-auto` with padding
- Renders `<MessageBubble>` for each message
- **Auto-scroll:** scroll to bottom when:
  - New message is added (user or assistant)
  - User is already at bottom (within 100px threshold)
  - Do NOT auto-scroll if user has scrolled up (reading history)
- Use `useRef` for scroll container + `useEffect` to detect scroll position
- **Scroll-to-bottom button:** floating button at bottom-right when user has scrolled up. Click → smooth scroll to bottom. Show message count badge if new messages arrived while scrolled up.
- Gap between messages: `space-y-4`
- Reverse-chronological-safe: messages are in chronological order (oldest first)

Update `packages/ui/src/components/chat/index.ts`:
```typescript
export { MessageList } from './message-list';
```

This component depends on P1T4 (MessageBubble) being available.
